name: de.jochenheckl.unity.databinding
description:
Bind your GameObjects directly to your data models — clean, reactive, and maintainable.

Declare type-safe bindings between data source properties and GameObject components instead of writing repetitive glue code. Supports single-property bindings and dynamic collection bindings that automatically instantiate or destroy child elements as your data changes. It's like WPF for Unity GameObjects.
